common.title: Welcome to
common.subtitle: Your Application
common.description: Get started by exploring our features and documentation.
common.dashboard_description: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can manage your account and view your activity.
common.overview_description: Get a quick overview of your account
common.overview_content: Your account overview and summary information.
common.statistics_content: Detailed statistics about your account activity.
common.activity_content: View your recent account activity and events.
common.profile_settings_description: Update your personal information and preferences.
common.personal_information_description: Manage your name, email, and interests.
common.name: Name
common.webpush_enable_hint: Get notified even when this tab is closed.
common.webpush_settings_description: Allow the browser to show system notifications for new activity, even when the tab is closed.
common.webpush_status_default: Not enabled yet. Use the button below to allow notifications.
common.webpush_status_granted: Enabled. Use sync again if pushes stop arriving.
common.webpush_status_denied_hint: Open this site's settings in your browser and allow notifications.
common.pwa_install_hint: Add to your home screen for quick access.
common.pwa_install_dismissed: Install dismissed. You can install later from the browser menu.
common.pwa_install_failed: Could not start install. Try your browser menu instead.
common.pwa_install_manual_ios: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
common.pwa_install_manual_android: Open the browser menu, then Install app or Add to Home screen.
common.pwa_install_manual_chrome: Open the address bar menu (⋮) and choose Install app.
